do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction in strong identity fields: Record 1 bundles Bx40 and Bx42 as 'Bx40/42' with variant 'local', while Record 2 is specifically 'Bx42' with no variant. Base route id differs (bundle vs single) and variant mismatch (known vs unknown). Per Decision Test 1 (contradiction), these are distinct records.

rationale: The two records have different base route identities: one bundles Bx40 and Bx42 as a single record with variant 'local', the other is specifically Bx42 with no variant. The Merge Canon for routes requires matching base route id and variant; a bundle does not equal a single route, and a known variant cannot merge with an unknown one. The relation_context already marks them as related_route, not the same object. Missing variant on the Bx42 record further confirms distinctness. [auto-accepted structurally per docs/identity-merge-canon.md; model confidence ignored]
